test_name: Worker emits action_ready with the (T, 6) chunk returned by the client
expected_result: pytest test passes or skips when its configured environment gate is unavailable

test_name: Worker emits error_occurred and not action_ready when infer() raises
expected_result: pytest test passes or skips when its configured environment gate is unavailable

test_name: App launches and window title matches YAML config
expected_result: Window title equals the value of window.title in gui_configuration.yaml (default: "Automate5 Industrial Control Hub").

test_name: Window dimensions match YAML width and height
expected_result: window.width() == YAML window.width (default 1920) and window.height() == YAML window.height (default 1080).

test_name: App falls back to defaults when YAML config is missing or corrupt
expected_result: Application starts; window title is 'Automate5 Industrial Control Hub'; window is 1920x1080; no Python traceback is printed to stderr.

test_name: Clicking the Base nav pill shows the Base panel
expected_result: QStackedWidget current index is 0; base_bridge.base_active_section == 'base'; Base nav pill is visually highlighted.

test_name: Clicking the VLA nav pill shows the VLA panel
expected_result: QStackedWidget current index is 1; all bridge active_section properties are set to 'vla'; VLA pill is highlighted.

test_name: Clicking the Analysis nav pill shows the Analytics panel
expected_result: QStackedWidget current index is 2; active_section properties set to 'analysis'; Analysis pill is highlighted.

test_name: Re-clicking the already-active nav pill is idempotent
expected_result: Stack index stays 0; base_active_section remains 'base'; no crash or visual flicker.

test_name: Play button starts the system; KPI shows RUNNING; mock timer fires
expected_result: base_start_clicked signal emits; KPI status text becomes 'RUNNING'; at least one motor RPM gauge shows a non-zero value from mock data; base_gesture_enabled is True (gesture pipeline started).

test_name: Stop button stops the system; KPI shows READY; gesture disabled
expected_result: base_stop_clicked signal emits; KPI status becomes 'READY'; base_gesture_enabled is False; mock timer stops.

test_name: Play → Stop → Play round-trip restores RUNNING state correctly
expected_result: System transitions READY → RUNNING → READY → RUNNING without error; mock RPM is non-zero on second start.

test_name: Reset clears motor gauges and stops the mock timer
expected_result: base_reset_clicked signal emits; all motor bridge data is zeroed via update_motor_data; KPI status is READY; no further mock ticks occur.

test_name: KPI strip renders READY status on initial load
expected_result: Status field shows 'READY'; totalRpm shows 0; fault count shows 0.

test_name: KPI totalRpm aggregates live mock RPM values across all motor cards
expected_result: KPI totalRpm equals the sum of individual motor card RPM gauge values (within rounding tolerance of ±1 RPM).

test_name: Uptime counter in KPI strip increments while system is running
expected_result: Uptime has increased by approximately 3 seconds.

test_name: Node tab count matches node_count from YAML config
expected_result: Number of visible tabs equals base_panel.node_count (default: 2).

test_name: Clicking a node tab updates base_active_node on the bridge
expected_result: bridge.base_active_node == 1 after clicking the second tab.

test_name: Motor card count per node matches motors_per_node from YAML
expected_result: Visible motor card count equals motors_per_node (default: 4).

test_name: Motor Start button emits base_motor_start signal with correct node and motor index
expected_result: base_motor_start emitted once with arguments (0, 0).

test_name: Motor Stop button emits base_motor_stop signal
expected_result: base_motor_stop emitted once with correct (node, motor) arguments.

test_name: Direction toggle emits base_motor_direction signal
expected_result: base_motor_direction emitted once; direction value alternates on successive clicks.

test_name: Setpoint input change emits base_motor_setpoint signal
expected_result: base_motor_setpoint emitted with the entered value and correct indices.

test_name: Torque limit change emits base_motor_torque_limit signal
expected_result: base_motor_torque_limit emitted with correct (node, motor, value) arguments.

test_name: Motor Reset button zeroes motor gauge and emits base_motor_reset signal
expected_result: base_motor_reset emitted with (node=0, motor=0); motor card 0 RPM gauge displays 0 immediately after reset.

test_name: E-stop button immediately zeroes motor bridge fields
expected_result: base_motor_estop signal emitted; motor bridge fields (rpm, speed, position, torque) zeroed for the affected motor; RPM gauge shows 0.

test_name: Manual Override Overlay opens from motor card action
expected_result: ManualOverrideOverlay is rendered on top of the panel; motor index shown is correct.

test_name: Mode selection in overlay emits base_motor_mode signal
expected_result: base_motor_mode emitted with the selected mode and (node=0, motor=0).

test_name: Target RPM entry in overlay emits base_motor_target_rpm signal
expected_result: base_motor_target_rpm emitted with 300 and correct (node, motor) indices.

test_name: Full rotation toggle emits base_motor_full_rotation signal
expected_result: base_motor_full_rotation emitted with True or False matching toggle state.

test_name: IQ torque entry in overlay emits base_motor_iq_torque signal
expected_result: base_motor_iq_torque emitted with 1.5 and correct motor indices.

test_name: Inspector toggle button opens the inspector dock
expected_result: InspectorDock slides in / becomes visible; Settings tab is selected by default.

test_name: Inspector toggle button closes the inspector dock
expected_result: InspectorDock hides; main content area re-expands.

test_name: Camera mode toggle in Settings tab emits base_toggle_changed signal
expected_result: base_toggle_changed emitted once with the new camera mode integer.

test_name: Configure button in Settings tab emits base_configure_clicked signal
expected_result: base_configure_clicked emitted with the three integer arguments matching selections.

test_name: Gestures tab renders gesture model items from config
expected_result: Gesture list shows the same number of items as gesture entries in YAML (default: 8).

test_name: Gesture enable toggle in Gestures tab updates base_gesture_enabled
expected_result: base_gesture_enabled flips between True and False on each toggle click.

test_name: Logs tab in inspector renders log entries from base_log_model
expected_result: At least one log entry is visible in the Logs tab ListView.

test_name: Clear Logs button in inspector Logs tab clears the local log model
expected_result: Log ListView has 0 items after Clear; analytic panel log file is NOT affected.

test_name: BasePanelBridge mock camera properties initialise from YAML
expected_result: base_mock_camera_enabled is True; base_mock_camera_count >= 1; url_at(0) returns a non-empty file:// URL; url_at(999) returns an empty string.

test_name: Mock single-camera configure sets CAM1 live and CAM2 stays off
expected_result: cam1 live flag is True; cam2 live flag is False; source 1 URL set.

test_name: Mock double-camera configure sets both CAM1 and CAM2 live
expected_result: Both cam live flags are True; source URLs are set and differ when 2+ mock sources exist.

test_name: enumerate_video_inputs returns equal-length label and device lists
expected_result: Both lists are the same length (>= 0); no exception raised even if no cameras present.

test_name: Configure with no cameras available prints warning and does not crash
expected_result: Presenter prints '[BasePanelPresenter] Configure: no cameras available'; no exception; cam1 live flag stays False.

test_name: GestureOverlay becomes visible after Play
expected_result: base_gesture_enabled is True; GestureOverlay.visible == True in QML.

test_name: GestureOverlay hides after Stop
expected_result: Overlay is no longer visible; gesture pipeline stopped.

test_name: Detected gesture updates bridge motor_id, speed, and stopped fields
expected_result: Bridge gesture properties (motor_id, speed, stopped) are updated matching the detected gesture payload.

test_name: VlaPanelBridge initialises with YAML-backed defaults
expected_result: vla_active_section == 'vla'; vla_node_count >= 1 (from YAML base_panel.node_count); vla_motors_per_node >= 1.

test_name: VLA panel renders motor cards and node tabs like Base panel
expected_result: Node tab count equals vla_node_count; motor card count equals vla_motors_per_node; layout is visually consistent with Base panel.

test_name: VLA text prompt submission emits vla_prompt_submitted signal
expected_result: vla_prompt_submitted emitted once with 'Pick up the red block'.

test_name: VLA Play/Stop transport mirrors Base panel behavior without gesture
expected_result: VLA transport play/stop behaves identically to Base except vla_gesture_enabled does not become True.

test_name: VLA mock camera configure (single and double mode) sets preview live flags
expected_result: VLA camera configure behavior is identical to Base panel equivalents (TC-GUI-101/102).

test_name: vla_panel.qml compiles to QQmlComponent.Status.Ready without errors
expected_result: Status is Ready; component.errors() is empty.

test_name: AnalyticPanelBridge initialises with correct defaults from YAML
expected_result: analytic_active_section == 'analysis'; analytic_display_mode == 'both' (YAML default_display_mode); analytic_split_ratio ≈ 0.55 (YAML default_split_ratio) within 1e-6.

test_name: Analytics panel autoloads log and benchmark data on init
expected_result: analytic_log_entries is a non-empty list; analytic_bench_entries is a non-empty list; analytic_log_error and analytic_bench_error are both empty strings.

test_name: Selecting LOGS mode hides benchmark pane and shows only logs pane
expected_result: analytic_display_mode set to 'logs' via analytic_set_display_mode; benchmark pane has height 0 or is hidden; logs pane fills available space.

test_name: Selecting BENCH mode hides logs pane and shows only benchmark pane
expected_result: Benchmark pane fills space; logs pane is hidden.

test_name: Selecting BOTH mode shows split view with both panes visible
expected_result: Both panes visible separated by draggable split handle; ratio ≈ 0.55.

test_name: Dragging the split handle updates analytic_split_ratio within clamped range
expected_result: Ratio is updated to ≈ 0.30 on first drag; clamped to 0.15 at lower bound; clamped to 0.85 at upper bound.

test_name: OPEN button in Logs pane opens FileDialog and accepted path triggers analytic_open_logs
expected_result: FileDialog opens; on acceptance, analytic_open_logs(path) is invoked; analytic_log_path is set to the selected file path.

test_name: REFRESH button reloads the current log file and updates entries
expected_result: analytic_refresh_logs() is called; log entries list is re-parsed; new entries from the appended data appear in the ListView.

test_name: CLEAR button resets log data, path, summary, and error
expected_result: All log-related bridge properties reset to empty/null defaults; ListView shows 'No log file loaded' placeholder.

test_name: Loading an invalid or missing log file path shows error banner
expected_result: analytic_log_error contains a descriptive error message; error banner is visible; log entries list remains empty.

test_name: Valid JSONL log file populates log ListView with subsystem-filtered entries
expected_result: Entries visible in ListView; subsystem filter reduces displayed items to only matching entries.

test_name: OPEN button in Benchmark pane opens CSV FileDialog and triggers analytic_open_bench
expected_result: FileDialog opens with CSV filter; on acceptance analytic_open_bench(path) is called; analytic_bench_path is set.

test_name: REFRESH button reloads the benchmark CSV and updates totals
expected_result: analytic_refresh_bench() is called; benchmark data is re-parsed; totals (count, total_ms, avg_ms) reflect the appended rows.

test_name: CLEAR button resets benchmark data, path, totals, and error
expected_result: All benchmark bridge properties reset to empty/zero defaults; pane shows 'Load a benchmark CSV to begin' placeholder.

test_name: Loading an invalid or missing CSV path shows error banner in Benchmark pane
expected_result: analytic_bench_error contains an error message; red error banner visible; totals remain at zeros; no application crash.

test_name: Benchmark totals KPI tiles display correct aggregates
expected_result: MEASUREMENTS tile shows correct count; TOTAL tile shows correct total_ms; AVG tile shows correct avg_ms (±0.01 ms tolerance); SLOWEST PHASE tile shows the phase with highest avg_ms.

test_name: Per-phase bar chart renders one row per distinct phase
expected_result: BarChart row count equals len(analytic_bench_by_phase); each row label matches a phase name from the CSV.

test_name: Per-subsystem stacked bar chart renders one row per distinct subsystem
expected_result: Row count equals len(analytic_bench_by_subsystem); each row label matches a subsystem name; total_ms values are correct per row.

test_name: base_panel.qml compiles to QQmlComponent.Status.Ready without errors
expected_result: Status is Ready; component.errors() is empty; AppComponents import resolves.

test_name: vla_panel.qml compiles to QQmlComponent.Status.Ready without errors
expected_result: Status is Ready; no QML errors.

test_name: analytic_panel.qml compiles to QQmlComponent.Status.Ready without errors
expected_result: Status is Ready; no QML errors.
